metadata.title: Mithril Snapshot UX Refinement Tasks
metadata.description: Decompose MithrilBootstrap into sub-components, add stepper UX, download metadata, stage-specific errors, theme variables, and Storybook coverage

phases.name: Backend Type & Pipeline Extensions
phases.description: Extend shared types and backend progress pipeline to carry file counts and error stage

tasks.title: Extend shared types
tasks.description: Add filesDownloaded, filesTotal to MithrilBootstrapStatusUpdate and stage to MithrilBootstrapError in source/common/types/mithril-bootstrap.types.ts

tasks.title: Update mithrilProgress parser
tasks.description: Extend MithrilProgressUpdate and parseMithrilProgressUpdate to preserve raw files_downloaded and files_total instead of only converting to percentage

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapService progress
tasks.description: In _downloadSnapshot(), include filesDownloaded and filesTotal from progress update in _updateStatus() call. Annotate errors with stage: 'download' | 'verify' | 'convert'

tasks.title: Annotate node-start failure stage
tasks.description: In handleDiskSpace.ts where _updateStatus({ status: 'failed' }) is called for node-start failures, set error.stage to 'node-start'

tasks.title: Update backend unit tests
tasks.description: Extend MithrilBootstrapService.spec.ts to verify filesDownloaded/filesTotal preservation and stage annotation on errors

phases.name: Store & Container Updates
phases.description: Extend MobX store with download metadata observables and computed properties

tasks.title: Add store observables and computeds
tasks.description: Add @observable filesDownloaded, filesTotal and @computed bytesDownloaded, throughputBps to MithrilBootstrapStore. Update _updateStatus action to assign file count fields

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapPage container
tasks.description: Pass new store observables (filesDownloaded, filesTotal, bytesDownloaded, throughputBps) through to the component

phases.name: i18n Message Extraction
phases.description: Extract and extend i18n messages before component decomposition

tasks.title: Extract i18n messages file
tasks.description: Create MithrilBootstrap.messages.ts with all 19 existing defineMessages entries plus ~8 new messages for stage-specific error titles/hints, download metadata labels, and step indicator labels

tasks.title: Run i18n extraction
tasks.description: Run yarn i18n:extract and yarn i18n:manage to sync translations. Update translations/messages.json with new entries

phases.name: Component Decomposition
phases.description: Break monolithic MithrilBootstrap.tsx into focused sub-components

tasks.title: Implement MithrilStepIndicator
tasks.description: New component modeled on SyncingProgress.tsx with 4 steps (preparing, downloading, verifying, finalizing), spinner/checkmark/pending states, and download metadata display

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotSelector
tasks.description: Extract and improve snapshot dropdown with truncated digest labels ({first8}...{last8}), locale-aware dates, and formatted size in option labels

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotDetails
tasks.description: Extract metadata grid (digest, date, size, node version) into dedicated component with truncated digest display

tasks.title: Implement MithrilErrorView
tasks.description: Stage-specific error screens with contextual titles/hints for download, verify, convert, node-start, and generic stages. Collapsible error code details and log path link

tasks.title: Implement MithrilProgressView
tasks.description: Compose MithrilStepIndicator + ProgressBarLarge + timing metadata + cancel button. Show bytesDownloaded/bytesTotal and throughput during download step

tasks.title: Implement MithrilDecisionView
tasks.description: Extract decision screen with title, description, MithrilSnapshotSelector, MithrilSnapshotDetails, and accept/decline buttons

tasks.title: Slim down root MithrilBootstrap.tsx
tasks.description: Reduce to overlay chrome (backdrop + centered card) + view delegation based on status. Create index.ts re-export

phases.name: Theming & Styling
phases.description: Migrate hardcoded colors to CSS theme variables and register in both themes

tasks.title: Migrate SCSS to theme variables
tasks.description: Replace all hardcoded backdrop/card/text/button colors in MithrilBootstrap.scss and new SCSS files with --theme-mithril-* CSS custom properties

tasks.title: Register theme variables
tasks.description: Add --theme-mithril-card-background, --theme-mithril-text-color, --theme-mithril-text-secondary, --theme-mithril-button-primary-background, etc. to cardano.ts (dark) and light-blue.ts (light) with matching dark defaults

tasks.title: Regenerate SCSS type definitions
tasks.description: Run yarn typedef:sass after all SCSS changes to regenerate .scss.d.ts files for new modules

phases.name: Accessibility & Storybook
phases.description: Add a11y attributes and full Storybook coverage

tasks.title: Add accessibility attributes
tasks.description: Add role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow/min/max, aria-live='polite' on step indicator, aria-label on buttons and Select, ensure keyboard navigability

tasks.title: Create Storybook stories
tasks.description: Add 12 stories: Decision (Loading, With Snapshots, Specific Snapshot), Progress (Preparing, Downloading early/mid, Verifying, Finalizing), Error (Download, Verify, Convert, Node Start)

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Run all checks and verify correctness

tasks.title: Run verification suite
tasks.description: Run yarn compile, yarn lint, yarn test:jest, yarn prettier:check, yarn storybook. Verify all 12 stories render correctly and theme variables are inherited
